title: Bun project init
acceptance_criteria: package.json uses Bun as runtime; scripts: dev (bun run src/index.ts --watch), sim (SIMULATE=true bun run src/index.ts --watch), start (bun run src/index.ts), migrate (bun run src/db/migrate.ts), test:unit (vitest run --project unit), test:integration (vitest run --project integration)
tsconfig.json: strict=true, target=ES2022, moduleResolution=bundler, no emit, paths configured for src/ alias
.gitignore excludes: .env, .env.local, .env.*.local, node_modules/, dist/, bun.lockb (old binary format), *.log, .DS_Store, coverage/
.gitignore explicitly does NOT exclude bun.lock (text format — this must be committed)

.env.example documents every required variable with placeholder values and comments: DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, SIMULATE, BROKER, BROKER_FALLBACK, FYERS_APP_ID (format: XXXXXXXXXXXX-100), FYERS_ACCESS_TOKEN (expires daily), ANGEL_API_KEY, ANGEL_CLIENT_CODE, ANGEL_CLIENT_PIN, ANGEL_TOTP_SECRET, QUANTIPLY_API_KEY, QUANTIPLY_API_URL, PORT (default 3000), SIM_TICK_INTERVAL_MS (default 500), ENTRY_TIME (default 09:17), ENTRY_CUTOFF_TIME (default 09:45), EOD_EXIT_TIME (default 15:25), MAX_DAILY_LOSS (default 10000), HARD_SL_PCT (default 0.3), TRAILING_SL_PCT (default 0.15), PROFIT_TARGET_PCT (default 0.3), BLOCKED_DATES (JSON array, pre-populated with 2026 NSE F&O expiry Thursdays: ["2026-01-29","2026-02-26","2026-03-26","2026-04-30","2026-05-28","2026-06-25","2026-07-30","2026-08-27","2026-09-24","2026-10-29","2026-11-26","2026-12-31"]), EVOLUTION_REQUIRE_APPROVAL (default true), LOG_LEVEL (default info)
bun install runs without errors and produces bun.lock (text, not binary bun.lockb)
src/index.ts is a minimal stub (console.log 'AI Trading Agent starting...') — full wiring done in T-21
No npm/yarn lockfiles generated; no package-lock.json or yarn.lock present
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
